title: Lush Scented Paradise
description: brings vibrant floral life and sophisticated beverage crafting to Minecraft!
body:
# 1. Some refreshing new flowers and crops

After adding the mod's world, you will encounter new flowers and crops.
These flowers may be rare or common, but please don't be stingy with your inventory and collect them as much as possible!

# 2. Two cool storage pockets 

Two easy-to-make bags with 27 storage slots.
Can only store seeds and flowers found during adventures

# 3.New crafting recipe   

To dry, place your items on it, and wait.
To brew tea, place the teapot over a heat source (campfire or smoker block) 
Prepare the ingredients and water and wait.

# 4.Make tea! The main point of this mod  

Over seventy unique drinks!
Each one provides a useful effect!
It is your good partner for adventurous life!

# 5.A new villager and a unique weapon.

New villager: Flower Master. Works on flower table.
Level 5 Flower master can trade for new weapons
Upgraded weapons provide different effects depending on the flowers in the off-hand.
